sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105220" key="trise/parxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐσ-έπαρχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔπαρχος,</foreign> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Praefectus Urbis,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.697</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
